chapter_title.en: Chapter on the Ruling Regarding Reserved Areas

text: 3418 - وَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ : "حَرِيمُ اَلنَّخْلَةِ طُولُ سَعَفَتِهَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3418 - The Messenger of Allah (swt) (peace be upon him and his family) said:
"The protected area (harim) of a palm tree is the length of its fronds."
